article_6.name: Article 6 funds
article_6.description: Financial products not claiming sustainable characteristics

article_8.name: Article 8 funds
article_8.description: Financial products promoting environmental or social characteristics

article_9.name: Article 9 funds
article_9.description: Financial products with sustainable investment objective

pai_indicators.scope: Principal Adverse Impacts on sustainability factors

notes: Do not reduce SFDR to ESG score. ESG scores may be raw inputs, but SFDR interpretation requires explicit mapping to Article 6/8/9 classification.
